Our Story

Built in
Nairobi.
Built for You.

My name is Shamsa. In Arabic, it means sunshine. I'm an accountant by day and a heavy trainer by choice — and I built SOLFIT because no woman in Nairobi should have to choose between coverage and performance.

Every piece in the SOLFIT collection is designed for real training — squat-proof, moisture-wicking, and built to move with you. Whether you cover up for faith, preference, or simply because you love the look — SOLFIT was made for you.

Shop the Launch Collection
Why SOLFIT

Performance.
Coverage. Style.

🧵

Premium Fabrics

80% Nylon / 20% Spandex ribbed seamless construction. 4-way stretch. Squat-proof. Moisture-wicking. The same quality used by global gymwear brands.

☀️

Modest by Design

Every piece designed from the ground up for full coverage — not afterthought modifications. High necklines, hip-length cuts, and matching sets that work together.

💪

Built for Heavy Training

SOLFIT was built by a trainer. Every piece passes the squat test, the deadlift test, and the full workout. Coverage that moves with you, not against you.

📦

Nairobi Delivery

Same-city delivery within 2–3 days. Free delivery on orders above KSh 5,000. Pay via M-Pesa, card, or bank transfer.

📐

Size Inclusive

XS through 2XL on every piece. Designed for real bodies, not sample sizes. Detailed size guide available so you get the perfect fit every time.

🔁

Easy Returns

7-day hassle-free returns if something doesn't fit. We want you to feel confident every time — if it's not right, we'll sort it out.

The TikTok Gym Aesthetic — Done Modest.

Ribbed seamless sets, oversized pump covers, matching co-ords — the looks going viral everywhere, now available in full coverage for every woman who trains.

Shop the Trend
